title: COUNTY CRISIS LINE - 211info
text: HEPPNER BEHAVIORAL HEALTH COUNTY CRISIS LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support for individuals experiencing mental health issues, thoughts of suicide, or other crises through a county crisis line. 550 West Sperry Street Heppner, OR 97836 Eligibility: Individuals experiencing a mental health emergency Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 676-9161 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 676-9161 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. On-call crisis workers are accessed through the county's 9-1-1 service. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Gilliam, Grant, Morrow, and Wheeler Counties Services: General Crisis Intervention Hotlines Mental Health Crisis Lines Suicide Prevention Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES COUNSELING SETTINGS - OREGON WARMLINE / LINEA DE ESPERANZA REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - DRUG AND ALCOHOL TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HEPPNER BEHAVIORAL HEALTH
